header.title: 21 rue du Chateau in La Canourgue (1).jpg
header.description:
Building at 21 rue du Château in La Canourgue, Lozère, France





 
This building is inscrit au titre des monuments historiques de la France. It is indexed in the base Mérimée, a database of architectural heritage maintained by the French Ministry of Culture, under the reference PA00103808 .

photos.title: Place de la Canourgue (33031832108).jpg
photos.description: View of the cross of the White Penitents erected in 1818 on the Place of the Canourgue in Montpellier. In background, view of Saint-Pierre cathedral.
photos.author: stefano Merli

photos.title: Place de la Canourgue (31966011127).jpg
photos.description: View of the cross of the White Penitents erected in 1818 on the Place of the Canourgue in Montpellier. In background, view of Saint-Pierre cathedral.
photos.author: stefano Merli

photos.title: St Martin church in La Canourgue (3).jpg
photos.description:
Portal of the Saint Martin collegiate church in La Canourgue, Lozère, France





 
This building is classé au titre des monuments historiques de la France. It is indexed in the base Mérimée, a database of architectural heritage maintained by the French Ministry of Culture, under the references IA48000178   and PA00103806 .
